title: Decorators, Cross-Cutting Behavior, and Transparent Wrappers · Pipeline Brief: Parameterized Decorators
summary: Add retries, timing, authorization checks, and telemetry without changing business function contracts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp parameterized decorators increment in a transparent decorator stack with order tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate decorator configuration, function wrapping, and call execution across closure layers.
Translate decorator syntax into explicit rebinding and predict application order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
